extortion.description: [AI generated] Prestige ER is a medical care organization located in Plano, Texas. Open 24/7, this emergency room provides immediate treatment for life-threatening conditions like heart attacks and strokes, as well as less severe issues like minor fractures and cuts. Their team of professionals includes board-certified physicians and experienced staff that utilize advanced facilities for quick diagnosis and treatments. This ER is independent from any hospital system and offers little to no wait time.
